title: Betfair Information-Lag Books Scientific Collaboration 6
thesis: Cross external event signals, time-zone maintenance patterns, and book synchronization delays to find stale pricing. This variant fuses network/epidemiology researcher guidance with game theory/behavioral researcher, information theory researcher to test contagion paths, information spread, and lag propagation across correlated books; opponent adaptation, crowd reflexivity, and exploitability of consensus breakdowns; entropy compression, surprise detection, and cross-feed information gain.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
